title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
